# illustrations-open-peeps

**Count:** 61 SVG files (target: 50+ — meets)
**Source:** Open Peeps by Pablo Stanley — https://www.openpeeps.com / openpeeps.com
**Acquired:** scraped from openpeeps.com CDN; `peep-N.svg` full-figure illustrations plus `mix-N.svg` premade compositions plus a footer header strip.

## Top 10 picks for Clawmachine

1. `5e535d4c5197057a87a74020_peep-100.svg` — neutral friendly figure; default empty-state.
2. `5e535cc533d36869f23e5264_mix-6.svg` — pre-posed multi-peep crowd; agent-at-work banner.
3. `5e535cc633d3686b733e5265_mix-7.svg` — second crowd composition; alt banner / workshop view.
4. `5e535b57f5fa1ab5dbfc2764_peep-83.svg` — seated posture; evaluator / desk scene.
5. `5e535b9746008059478ec0d0_peep-85.svg` — thinking pose; advisor / consult slot.
6. `5e535b7a8becbf1fc35460c4_peep-84.svg` — device-in-hand; marketplace triage UI.
7. `5e535bcfc9925003b4cb6660_peep-87.svg` — animated gesture; onboarding hero.
8. `5e51cc5933d368febc351897_footer-img.svg` — panoramic strip; page-footer illustration slot.
9. `5e535cf47488c27eb04a70d1_peep-97.svg` — relaxed standing; low-priority page backgrounds.
10. `5e535ae064109d61f102506b_peep-79.svg` — distinctive hair silhouette; avatar placeholder.

## Notes

Files are named by CDN hash + peep/mix number. Names are opaque; pick by preview in finder.
